raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 1,
    "R1.6": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output does not check claim-evidence linkage. The text presents results without explicitly connecting them to the evidence provided in the paper.",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs. The writing is generally clear, but there are some instances of awkward phrasing and repetition.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident. The output does not distinguish between claims that are well-supported and those that are more speculative.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift. The output focuses on the main points of the paper, but there is some minor deviation from the intended scope.",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression. The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content, but it does not fully address all of the potential issues raised in the paper.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not. The output clearly identifies the sources used to support the main claims, but it does not provide detailed information about all of the changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output does not check claim-evidence linkage. The text presents results without explicitly connecting them to the evidence provided in the paper.
rationale.R1.6: Improves a few problem paragraphs. The writing is generally clear, but there are some instances of awkward phrasing and repetition.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident. The output does not distinguish between claims that are well-supported and those that are more speculative.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift. The output focuses on the main points of the paper, but there is some minor deviation from the intended scope.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression. The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content, but it does not fully address all of the potential issues raised in the paper.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not. The output clearly identifies the sources used to support the main claims, but it does not provide detailed information about all of the changes made.
